children.name: I build the systems behind brands that need to mov
children.characters:
For over twelve years, I’ve helped brands to turn creative vision into scalable digital platforms — shaping visual languages, defining shared foundations, and aligning teams around how we build. 

I build systems for teams that need to move at scale without losing their soul.

children.name: Work Title
children.characters: creating Crate: Heineken’s B2B design language used by 225+ team members

children.name: Work Title
children.characters: Building the brand framework and team culture that launched Eazle, Heineken’s B2B platform

25:3117.name: .Media Ratio
25:3117.description: Aspect-ratio primitive for media content. Use Ratio + Orientation to define the nested media shape. Square is orientation-neutral, Standard maps to 3:2 / 2:3, and Wide maps to 16:9 / 9:16.
